data.content: Plan reviewed and approved. Codebase assumptions verified against actual code. Key note: src/app.rs is 2163 lines so hierarchy logic MUST go in a new module. Plan correctly covers: direct-child progress blocking, deferred_from_state comparison, terminal cascade with approval, deepest-first ordering, and --force bypass prohibition. Test strategy is comprehensive. Child knot decomposition (8a97, 642d, 142d) is well-scoped.
